title: An Act to Amend the Composition of the Landowners and Land Users Relations Advisory Board
last_house_action: 3/25/2026 - PASSED TO BE ENACTED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 3/26/2026 - PASSED TO BE ENACTED , in concurrence.

actions.description: Reported that the same be REFERRED to the Committee on INLAND FISHERIES AND WILDLIFE , pursuant to Resolve, chapter 82, section 6. Report READ and ACCEPTED . Bill and accompanying papers REFERRED to the Committee on INLAND FISHERIES AND WILDLIFE . Sent down for concurrence.
Report was READ and ACCEPTED . The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on INLAND FISHERIES AND WILDLIFE In concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
Report READ and ACCEPTED Bill READ ONCE Committee Amendment "A" (S-557) READ and ADOPTED. ASSIGNED FOR SECOND READING NEXT LEGISLATIVE DAY.

COMMITTEE ON BILLS IN THE SECOND READING REPORTS NO FURTHER VERBAL AMENDMENTS NECESSARY. REPORT ACCEPTED. READ A SECOND TIME and PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED AS AMENDED BY Committee Amendment "A" (S-557) Ordered sent down forthwith for concurrence.

CONSENT CALENDAR - FIRST DAY Under suspension of the rules CONSENT CALENDAR - SECOND DAY. The Bill was PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED as Amended by Committee Amendment "A" (S-557) . In concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
PASSED TO BE ENACTED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
PASSED TO BE ENACTED , in concurrence.
